title: URGENT CARE - 211info
text: GOOD SHEPHERD URGENT CARE URGENT CARE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides walk-in treatment services for urgent health care needs that are not life-threatening, including care for minor injuries and fractures, sprains and strains, allergies and asthma, cold and flu symptoms, cuts and abrasions, urinary symptoms, minor eye injuries, pink eye, earaches, burn care, and skin rashes and conditions. Also offers sports physicals, EKGs, vaccinations and immunizations, sutures and stitches, and on-site medications. 1050 W Elm Avenue Hermiston, OR 97838 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: 7 days per week 7am-7pm (541) 567-2995 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 567-2995 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, or visit website to schedule an urgent care appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance. Financial assistance may be available to those who qualify. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Umatilla County Services: Urgent Care Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOOD SHEPHERD URGENT CARE
